problem: omega_unstable 终止：100% episode 在 step 0 失败。IntW 饱和从 ±5Hz 扩展到 ±15Hz 后，随机策略无法在 DIST_MAX=3.0(300MW) 下保持稳定。
hypothesis: 单机稳态公式 Δf_ss = DIST_MAX × F_NOM / (N × D_LO) = 1.5 × 50 / (4 × 1.5) = 12.5 Hz < 12.75 Hz 阈值，降到 DIST_MAX=1.5 应能通过频率安全边界。

summary: 365/371 episode 仍命中 14.5Hz；settled_rate=0。单机稳态公式未计入 Kundur 两区域区间振荡模式(~0.5Hz)，峰值约为稳态 2-2.5 倍(≈14.5Hz)，仍超 IntW 上限 15Hz。验证只检查 Python 层终止，未端到端验证 omega 轨迹。
transfer_notes: Kundur 两区域振荡倍增效应，NE39 拓扑不同，不可直接迁移

problem: 删除 DIST_MAX 只治标：365/371 个 episode 频率仍超 14.5Hz，omega_unstable 守卫使 100% episode 提前终止，RL 完全无法积累有效经验。
hypothesis: 论文 Sec.IV-A 明确固定 M=50 步，无频率触发终止。删除 Python 层 omega_unstable 守卫对齐论文，让高频偏差由 Simulink 内部饱和处理，不在 Python 层提前截断 episode。

summary: 507/510 episode 命中 max_freq_dev>=14.5Hz，settled_rate=0/510，大量日志贴着 15.0Hz 并伴随 tds_failed=true。正确对齐了论文终止机制，但 IntW 积分器在 UpperSaturationLimit=1.3(±15Hz) 处仍然饱和，omega 读数失真，replay buffer 全是失真数据。混淆了「终止机制」和「饱和失真机制」——停止提前结束并不等于解决了频率过高的根因。
transfer_notes: IntW 饱和是 Kundur Simulink 模型结构问题，NE39 模型需独立确认

problem: 三次修改共同盲点：只处理「如何让 episode 不那么快结束」，未处理「频率偏差物理上为何这么高」。根因：(1) IntW UpperSaturationLimit=1.3(±15Hz) 硬截断，饱和后 omega 读数不反映真实物理，reward 计算失真；(2) D_LO=1.5 阻尼过小；(3) 无端到端 omega 轨迹验证。
hypothesis: (a) 新增显式 omega_saturated/hit_freq_clip 监控（不是依赖 tds_failed）；(b) 用 harness 做 DIST_MAX × D 参数稳定域扫描，找到 IntW 不饱和 + tds_failed≈0 + settled_rate>0 的参数区间；(c) Q7（论文 D 量纲）未澄清前不直接修改 D 到 200+ 量级。
evidence_source: Codex review of Kd.md — 已验证部分和推断部分见文件注释

title: M/D rate limiting to prevent inter-area mode excitation
problem: Random policy applies abrupt M/D jumps every DT=0.2s, acting as 5 Hz broad-band excitation of the Kundur 0.5 Hz inter-area mode. After P_ref fix (opt_kd_P0_ramp), rewards improved from -535K to -940, but mean_freq_dev=11-13 Hz and omega_saturated=100% persisted across all 27 observed episodes. Saturation begins at step 0-3 before any disturbance is applied.
hypothesis: Rate-limiting M/D transitions to max 2.4/0.6 pu per step converts abrupt white-noise excitation into a slow random walk. Full M range (24 pu) takes ~10 steps (2s) to traverse — longer than one inter-area oscillation cycle (2s at 0.5 Hz). This prevents sustained high-frequency forcing of the mode.
changes: env/simulink/kundur_simulink_env.py: np.clip(M_target, self._M-delta, self._M+delta) in step()
expected: omega_saturated rate < 50% in first 50 eps; mean_freq_dev < 6 Hz; saturation onset shifts from step 0-3 to step 15+

problem: Persistent 100% omega saturation: IntW integrator hits ±15 Hz limit from step 0. Mean freq_dev=12-15 Hz before any disturbance. Root cause: ConvGen and VSG internal reactances declared in pu on wrong (system) base.
hypothesis: build_powerlib_kundur.m line 66 X_gen_pu=0.30 is the Xd transient reactance on MACHINE BASE (900 MVA for ConvGen, 200 MVA for VSG), but was applied directly on SYSTEM BASE (100 MVA). On system base: X_gen=0.30 → P_max=333 MW < P0=700 MW → ConvGens always beyond stability limit → perpetual oscillation. Also: all delta_0 near 0° → Pe≈0 at t=0 → massive initial transient.
changes: build_powerlib_kundur.m: (1) ConvGen impedance: R_gen_pu=0.003*(Sbase/900e6)=3.33e-4 pu, X_gen_pu=0.30*(Sbase/900e6)=0.0333 pu on Sbase; P_max now 3000 MW >> P0=700 MW. (2) VSG impedance: separate R_vsg/L_vsg variables, X_vsg_pu=0.30*(Sbase/VSG_SN)=0.15 pu on Sbase; P_max now 667 MW >> P0=375 MW. (3) Delta ICs updated to physically consistent angles: G1=20°, G2=17°, G3=-7°, ES1=18°, ES2=10°, ES3=7°, ES4=12° (vs. previous 0° to -5.5°). Note: VSG_P0 recalibration needed after rebuild.
expected: omega_sat_rate < 50%, mean_freq_dev < 8 Hz at steady state. ConvGens now operate at 23% of P_max (vs. 210% before) — stable region. VSGs at 56% of P_max — stable. Initial transient from imperfect delta_0 should decay within first few simulation seconds due to RL branch resistance and swing equation damping.
run_before: kundur_simulink_20260417_152950 (EP1-66): 100% omega_sat, mean_freq_dev=15 Hz, reward=-642 to -797

summary: M/D rate limiting did not reduce omega saturation. df=15 Hz persisted from EP1-66 in run kundur_simulink_20260417_152950. Root cause was the impedance base conversion bug, not action abruptness.
